# currency

**Instance Property**

A value that represents the currency the data detectors were able to match, though it may be a best guess.

## Declaration

```swift
let currency: Locale.Currency
```

## Properties that describe elements of the amount

- **amount**: A value that represents the amount of money in the specified currency.

items.description: A value that represents the amount of money in the specified currency.
items.name: amount
